inputs.label: Hip Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Measured at the widest part of the hips, in centimeters. Typical range 80-130 cm for adults.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured at the widest part of the hips, in centimeters. Typical range 80-130 cm for adults.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalçanın en geniş kısmından ölçülür, santimetre cinsinden. Yetişkinler için tipik aralık 80-130 cm.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessen an der breitesten Stelle der Hüften, in Zentimetern. Typischer Bereich 80-130 cm für Erwachsene.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesuré à la partie la plus large des hanches, en centimètres. Plage typique 80-130 cm pour les adultes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Medida en la parte más ancha de las caderas, en centímetros. Rango típico 80-130 cm para adultos.

inputs.label: Height
inputs.businessContext: Standing height without shoes, in centimeters. Typical range 140-200 cm.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standing height without shoes, in centimeters. Typical range 140-200 cm.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ayakta, ayakkabısız boy, santimetre cinsinden. Yetişkinler için tipik aralık 140-200 cm.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergröße ohne Schuhe, in Zentimetern. Typischer Bereich 140-200 cm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taille debout sans chaussures, en centimètres. Plage typique 140-200 cm.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura de pie sin zapatos, en centímetros. Rango típico 140-200 cm.

inputs.label: Weight
inputs.businessContext: Body weight in kilograms. Typical range 40-150 kg.

businessContext_i18n.en: Body weight in kilograms. Typical range 40-150 kg.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vücut ağırlığı, kilogram cinsinden. Tipik aralık 40-150 kg.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergewicht in Kilogramm. Typischer Bereich 40-150 kg.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel en kilogrammes. Plage typique 40-150 kg.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso corporal en kilogramos. Rango típico 40-150 kg.

inputs.label: Neck Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Neck circumference measured below the larynx, in centimeters. Typical range 30-50 cm.

businessContext_i18n.en: Neck circumference measured below the larynx, in centimeters. Typical range 30-50 cm.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gırtlağın altından ölçülen boyun çevresi, santimetre cinsinden. Tipik aralık 30-50 cm.
businessContext_i18n.de: Halsumfang gemessen unterhalb des Kehlkopfes, in Zentimetern. Typischer Bereich 30-50 cm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tour de cou mesuré sous le larynx, en centimètres. Plage typique 30-50 cm.
businessContext_i18n.es: Circunferencia del cuello medida debajo de la laringe, en centímetros. Rango típico 30-50 cm.

inputs.label: Waist Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Waist circumference measured at the narrowest point or navel, in centimeters. Typical range 60-120 cm.

businessContext_i18n.en: Waist circumference measured at the narrowest point or navel, in centimeters. Typical range 60-120 cm.
businessContext_i18n.tr: En dar noktadan veya göbek deliğinden ölçülen bel çevresi, santimetre cinsinden. Tipik aralık 60-120 cm.
businessContext_i18n.de: Taillenumfang gemessen an der schmalsten Stelle oder am Bauchnabel, in Zentimetern. Typischer Bereich 60-120 cm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tour de taille mesuré au point le plus étroit ou au nombril, en centimètres. Plage typique 60-120 cm.
businessContext_i18n.es: Circunferencia de cintura medida en el punto más estrecho o en el ombligo, en centímetros. Rango típico 60-120 cm.

inputs.label: Gender (0=Male, 1=Female)
inputs.businessContext: Biological sex: 0 for male, 1 for female. Determines body fat estimation model.

businessContext_i18n.en: Biological sex: 0 for male, 1 for female. Determines body fat estimation model.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Biyolojik cinsiyet: 0 erkek, 1 kadın. Vücut yağı tahmin modelini belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Biologisches Geschlecht: 0 für männlich, 1 für weiblich. Bestimmt das Modell zur Körperfettschätzung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sexe biologique : 0 pour homme, 1 pour femme. Détermine le modèle d'estimation de la graisse corporelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Sexo biológico: 0 para hombre, 1 para mujer. Determina el modelo de estimación de grasa corporal.

inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age in years. For reference; not used in calculations but may affect interpretation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age in years. For reference; not used in calculations but may affect interpretation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaş (yıl). Referans amaçlıdır; hesaplamalarda kullanılmaz ancak yorumlamayı etkileyebilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter in Jahren. Dient als Referenz; wird nicht in Berechnungen verwendet, kann aber die Interpretation beeinflussen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge en années. Pour référence ; non utilisé dans les calculs mais peut affecter l'interprétation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad en años. Para referencia; no se usa en cálculos pero puede afectar la interpretación.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
